examples: Aunty Henny was an outgoing but reticent person.
Henny has been silent, or almost silent, throughout.
Henny Penny, the sky is falling. I'm going to tell the king.
Henny Youngman, the late borscht belt comedian, told hundreds of politically incorrect jokes.
For Henny, Shanti was the sole link to her past life in Berlin, a city that she was never to revisit.
